title: Address
description: Postal address. All fields are OPTIONAL by design — the buyer agent should pass through whatever pieces of the address are available (e.g. just a ZIP for regional pricing, or just city+state, or the full street address). The dealer is responsible for handling partial addresses gracefully.

country.description: Country code or name (e.g. 'US'). Optional; defaults to 'US' when omitted.

state.description: State / region code or full name (e.g. 'CA' or 'California').

address_line_2.description: Secondary street line (suite, apartment, building, floor).
